title: oldenlandia buxifolia
intro: Oldenlandia buxifolia is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Oldenlandia buxifolia include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of various infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and infusions in combination with other herbs to create remedies for various health conditions.
